strengths: Distributed systems engineering at scale with low-latency, high-throughput production experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Current hands-on work with agentic AI frameworks and MCP infrastructure demonstrating technical relevance
Strong technical breadth across languages and platforms with demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No executive leadership experience; all roles are individual contributor or staff engineer level with no demonstrated team scaling or organizational building
Virtually no fintech background; no evidence of regulated systems, credit infrastructure, working capital, or financial operations experience
Agentic AI systems involvement very recent (2 months); no production deployment track record or evidence of operating systems with real financial consequences
response.justification: While Szabo demonstrates solid distributed-systems engineering and recent agentic AI exposure, he lacks the executive CTO foundations this role demands. The position explicitly requires 5+ years of senior technical leadership scaling engineering organizations at scale-ups; this resume contains only individual contributor and staff engineer roles with no demonstrated ability to build or lead teams. The fintech infrastructure familiarity is absent—no credit systems, payment flows, regulated environments, or high-stakes financial operations experience. Most critically, agentic AI systems work is nascent (current role, 2 months) rather than the production deployment track record required. Technically capable but lacks the executive leadership pedigree and domain depth the CTO role requires.
